title: Waxum
description: Multi-session REST API gateway for the WhatsApp Web client, built in Rust. Manage many WhatsApp sessions behind one API with low memory footprint and high throughput.

title: Marspedia
description: Game top-up / PPOB platform (Laravel 12, Alpine.js, Tailwind). Integrated iPaymu payment gateway (QRIS + VA + e-wallet) and Digiflazz PPOB provider (~5000 SKUs auto-synced via queue). Migrated image storage to Cloudflare R2 and cut image serving from 300ms to 5ms via static-file symlink.

title: Fit Motor — AI WhatsApp CRM
description: End-to-end AI-powered WhatsApp customer-service platform for a multi-branch motorcycle workshop chain. Hono + TypeScript, Drizzle (PostgreSQL + pgvector) RAG knowledge base, BullMQ/Redis queues. 2-stage LLM pipeline cut booking response from ~90s to ~5s; Vue 3 admin dashboard + LLM-as-judge eval across 14 models.

title: Klinik Dr. Angga — WhatsApp AI
description: WhatsApp dashboard + AI chatbot (OpenAI) automating a healthcare clinic's customer service — ~10,000 patients and 290,000+ messages processed automatically. Node.js, Express, Sequelize (MySQL), Redis, multi-instance WhatsApp via WUZAPI, Socket.io real-time dashboard, Dockerized (6 services).

title: Tenun
description: Programming language with full Indonesian keywords (kalau, selama, untuk, fungsi, kembali) and a compiler written in Zig. Statically typed, with three execution backends from one source — tree-walking interpreter, bytecode VM, and native via C transpilation. Ships a REPL, formatter, package manager, VSCode + Neovim extensions, and a 25+ module ecosystem (web, ORM, Redis, mail, scraping).

title: Cloudflare Tunnel for aaPanel
description: aaPanel plugin that manages Cloudflare Tunnel (cloudflared) end-to-end from the panel UI. 4-step wizard: auto-downloads the binary, reuses cloudflare_manage creds, creates tunnels, upserts proxied CNAMEs, writes config.yml, and installs the systemd service with atomic rollback. Expose NAT/CGNAT servers with no public IP.

title: node-smpp-next
description: SMPP client and server implementation in Node.js — a modern, TypeScript-typed rewrite for sending and receiving SMS over the SMPP protocol. Published as an npm module.

title: mcp-cpanel-api
description: MCP server for cPanel UAPI — manage email, domains, databases, files, Git, SSL, DNS, and security directly from Claude and other AI assistants.

title: httptoolkit-mcp
description: MCP server for HTTP Toolkit — intercept, inspect, and debug HTTP traffic via AI assistants.

title: mcpimg
description: MCP server for AI image generation via OpenRouter, Together AI, Replicate, and fal.ai.

title: gtranslate-api
description: Free and unlimited Google Translate API wrapper for Node.js.

title: cpanel-uapi
description: JavaScript/TypeScript client library for the cPanel UAPI.

title: olx-scraper
description: Unofficial OLX client API and scraper for Node.js.

title: puppeteer-auto-position
description: Launch Puppeteer with automatic browser window positioning.

title: indonesia-number-provider-checker
description: Return the Indonesian mobile operator name from a phone number.

title: maillogmonitor
description: Monitor mail.log for delivery events and parse SMTP activity in real time.

title: bahlib
description: Package manager dengan rasa Indonesia — NPM tapi ada drama SPBU-nya. A satirical Node package manager.

title: telegram-cli
description: Telegram client that runs entirely in your terminal. Built in Go — chat, send, and read messages without leaving the command line.

title: WareHaus
description: Real-time inventory management system. Stock tracking, purchase orders, supplier management, and warehouse activity logs.

title: MauBlast
description: WhatsApp API gateway for businesses — no Meta Business required. Multi-session, auto-reply, blast with throttling, real-time webhooks. Powered by WA-RS under the hood.

title: RentalWA
description: WhatsApp number rental platform. Rent idle WA numbers for blast campaigns — pay per message, no contract. Full CRM, Redis queue, Terraform infra.

title: HarmoniCRM
description: Client relationship management system built on Laravel 12. Contact management, deal pipeline, task tracking, and team collaboration.

title: Faskes Network Dashboard
description: Dashboard interaktif peta persebaran fasilitas kesehatan — 112 Puskesmas & 98 Rumah Sakit di 24 wilayah. Filter per kabupaten, toggle tipe faskes, satelit/peta, dan popup detail lokasi.

title: WA-RS
description: Multi-session WhatsApp REST API gateway rewritten from Node.js to Rust. Dropped memory from 8GB to minimal, eliminated CPU spikes, unlimited sessions.

title: Pocket Pentester
description: 21-module native Android offensive security toolkit. 34MB APK, no root, fully offline. Port scan, SQLi, XSS, JWT attack, dir-fuzz, Burp-lite repeater.

title: CiLocks
description: Android lockscreen interface crack tool with Metasploit integration and iOS/Android hacking utilities. Most-starred project across all accounts.

title: Frida Multiple Bypass
description: One-shot Frida script bypassing SSL pinning, root detection, emulator detection, Frida detection, and Flutter TLS simultaneously. 175 stars.

title: YOMEN
description: YouTube auto-commenter bot using Puppeteer. Multi-account, cookie auth, proxy support, comment rotation. 227 stars.

title: mapsdumper
description: Dump Google Maps place details at scale — phones, emails, websites, and reviews. 73 stars.

title: Satria Proxy
description: Desktop proxy scraper and checker. Scrapes proxies from multiple sources, validates them live for speed and anonymity. Built with Python and PySide6.

title: Driver Booster Pro
description: Native Windows desktop app for driver management. Built with Go + WebView2 + direct Win32 API calls. Frameless window, WinUI3 styling, PowerShell without CMD flash.

title: GoAMPP
description: 7MB native Windows web stack (Apache + MySQL + PHP) replacing 200MB XAMPP. Single executable, no Docker, no WSL, no Java required.

title: WinRavel
description: Bundle any Laravel app into one self-contained Windows .exe. FrankenPHP (PHP 8.5 + Caddy), SQLite or a bundled MariaDB server, composer and git all baked in. Build-time setup (migrate/seed), app/ source obfuscation, and self-extracting output. C#/.NET builder + launcher.

title: WA Blast Desktop
description: Electron desktop app for managing WhatsApp sessions and sending bulk messages. Dark theme UI, multi-session, contact import.

title: DroidQEMU
description: Run a full QEMU virtual machine directly on Android. Native Kotlin app, no root required. Includes virtual keyboard support.

title: SHINRAI
description: AI-powered SSH manager and DevOps agent that runs in your terminal. Manage servers, execute commands, and automate ops tasks with AI assistance.

title: Youtube Downloader
description: Desktop app wrapping yt-dlp in a native Tauri + Rust shell. Clean GUI, format selection, download queue.

title: Absensi Siswa Digital
description: Student attendance system integrated with fingerprint scanner and face detection. Replaces manual roll call for schools.

title: Frida Launcher
description: Android app that automatically downloads and runs the latest Frida server — no manual ADB setup needed.

title: Auto-Bid Bot
description: Auto-bid bot for Projects.co.id. Grok AI solves captchas, scans listings by keyword, 24/7 loop with Rezi TUI dashboard. TLS-impersonated to bypass Cloudflare.
